web-build.details: All routes compiled and generated successfully

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add 'cleanup_deleted' to the Status Model section as a system-internal status marker used by migration 005 to soft-delete polluted rows. It should be listed separately from the 5 user-facing statuses with a note that it is not displayed in the UI or used by the agent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: supabase/migrations/005_cleanup_polluted.sql adds 'cleanup_deleted' to the CHECK constraint. AGENTS.md Status Model only lists 5 statuses (pending, in_progress, done, not_confirmed, canceled).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider creating a backend-worker skill definition in .factory/skills/ if future milestones will assign features with skillName 'backend-worker'. The worker for data-migration-cleanup could not invoke its assigned skill and had to implement directly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker transcript shows 'Skill backend-worker returned not found error'. Worker completed successfully by implementing directly without the skill procedure.
